positive: Minimalist vector style illustration of a stylized golden retriever puppy happily chasing a floating rainbow, rendered with thick, clean black outlines and bright, saturated, flat colors (yellow, soft pastels, sky blue). The dog is the central focus, viewed in a dynamic, playful leaping pose. Composition should be balanced and symmetrical, suitable for a t-shirt print. Use solid color blocking and negative space effectively. High contrast, graphic design aesthetic, clean silhouette, vector art quality.
